name: Food or Recipe Assistant
description:
Fora, your assistant that you can ask for recipes, for substitute ingredients esp for a low calorie diet, and for recipe suggestions based on your current ingredients.

I wanted to make things easier for me and made a bot do the research for me. Might as well share it. I recommend having your tokens at 0/unlimited.

Please use the comments for your suggestions.

ps. I used Xavier's pic from LADs just cuz.
creator: hwangquokka
